channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Guilherme Vasconcelos, former UFC and Bellator fighter, dead at 38
item.description: Guilherme Vasconcelos, a former UFC and Bellator mixed martial arts fighter, has died at the age of 38, his family announced on social media.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bay Area News Group high school football predictions: Week 8, 2024
item.description: The guys pick 15 games across the Bay Area, including De La Salle vs. San Ramon Valley, St. Francis at St. Ignatius, Live Oak vs. Santa Teresa, San Leandro vs. Moreau Catholic, Menlo School vs. Menlo-Atherton, and more.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Shedeur Sanders will 'probably' be the 1st quarterback taken in 2025 NFL Draft, Heisman Trophy winner says
item.description: Johnny Manziel thinks Shedeur Sanders will "probably" be the first quarterback taken in the next year's NFL Draft during a recent episode of “Big Bets on Campus Podcast.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ravens' dynamic duo of Henry and Jackson help lead a rushing renaissance in the NFL
item.description: Inside the Numbers dives into NFL statistics, streaks and trends each week. For more Inside the Numbers, head here. ___ The running game has had a bit of a renaissance early this season thanks in part to a dynamic duo in Baltimore off to a historic start.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Detroit Lions blowout sparks on-air hissy fit from Cowboys owner
item.description: The owner of the Dallas Cowboys threw a hissy fit after his team’s blowout loss to the Detroit Lions.
item.dc:creator: Derick Hutchinson, Local 4

item.title: Serena Williams says she had a benign cyst removed from her neck and 'all is OK'
item.description: Serena Williams says she had a benign branchial cyst “the size of a small grapefruit” removed from her neck and “all is OK.”.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: TEXANS NEWSLETTER: Texans crush Patriots for first victory at Gillette Stadium
item.description: The Houston Texans achieved a historic 41-21 victory over the New England Patriots at Gillette Stadium, marking their best performance of the season.
item.dc:creator: Chancellor Johnson, Holly Galvan Posey, KPRC 2

item.title: Michelle Obama will headline an Atlanta rally aimed at boosting voter turnout
item.description: Former first lady Michelle Obama is headlining a rally in Atlanta alongside celebrities and local civic leaders focusing on engaging younger and first-time voters, as well as voters of color.
item.dc:creator: Matt Brown, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Thomas Tuchel hired as England head coach ahead of 2026 World Cup and targets 'second star'
item.description: Thomas Tuchel has been hired as England coach and will take on the challenge of ending the national team’s decades-long wait for a trophy.
item.dc:creator: James Robson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Injured Alex Cobb dropped from Guardians' ALCS roster, replaced by Ben Lively
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Pitcher Alex Cobb was dropped from Cleveland's American League Championship Series roster on Tuesday after he got hurt yet again in the opener, leaving the Guardians in search of a Game 5 starter against the New York Yankees. “It’s been a challenging year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Breanna Stewart and her wife Marta Xargay receive homophobic threats after Game 1 of WNBA Finals
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — New York Liberty star Breanna Stewart and her wife Marta Xargay received threatening homophobic anonymous emails after Game 1 of the WNBA Finals. The emails went directly to Xargay's account, which was a bit unnerving for the couple, Stewart said at practice on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Each Mets, Yankees home game generates over $20 million for NYC
item.description: NEW YORK CITY (PIX11) – With a potential Subway World Series around the corner, New Yorkers are spending big on the Yankees and Mets.
item.dc:creator: Emily Rahhal, PIX 11

item.title: Grand Junction football's future looks bright
item.description: At 6-1, it’s the Tigers' best start to a season since 2011. And Grand Junction appears to be set for long-term success.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Cam Rising out for the season with lower leg injury
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Cam Rising's return to the field lasted all of one game. Utah head coach Kyle Whittingham announced on Monday that Rising is out for the season after suffering a lower leg injury on the first series in Friday's 27-19 loss at Arizona State.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU hopes to finish strong after 6-0 start
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - From being picked 13th in the Big 12 Conference, to be ranked 13th in the nation, BYU is off to a 6-0 start for just the sixth time in school history without any superstars or sure-fire NFL prospects. In fact, 16 different players have scored touchdowns this year.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Nevada could be latest to forfeit SJSU volleyball match amidst transgender lawsuit
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (KRON) -- The University of Nevada, Reno (UNR) could be the latest team to forfeit a women's volleyball match against San Jose State University.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Lindor homers as Mets stop Dodgers' scoreless streak in 7-3 win, head to NY with NLCS tied 1-1
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The New York Mets weren't sure what they were going to get with the Los Angeles Dodgers sending out a parade of relievers in a bullpen game. They found out right away.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Column: Caleb Williams has arrived and the Bears are a playoff team
item.description: Caleb Williams has shown impressive improvement in his first six games with the Chicago Bears, leading the team to three straight wins and a potential playoff berth.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Dodgers' Flaherty shares NLCS Game 1 'moment' with mother
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers' major trade-deadline acquisition from this summer is already worth it. Jack Flaherty was the star of the show in Game 1 of the NLCS between L.A. and the New York Mets, as he pitched an electric seven shutout innings while giving up just two hits in a 9-0 win.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Bucs with Bowles looks back at hurricane worries and one big win
item.description: Buccaneers Head Coach Todd Bowles stayed up most of the night last Wednesday into Thursday morning watching Hurricane Milton consume the Tampa Bay area with damaging high winds, torrential rain, and flood waters claiming spots that had barely begun recovery from Hurricane Helene less than two weeks
item.dc:creator: Dan Lucas, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Los Angeles Rams implementing new AI technology during football games
item.description: The technologically advanced home of the Los Angeles Rams is about to have a new way for fans to track players’ statistics from their seats during the game.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Jerry West becomes first three-time inductee as Carter and Billups enter basketball's Hall of Fame
item.description: SPRINGFIELD, Mass. (AP) — The stage was filled with Laker greats when Jerry West made history Sunday night by becoming the first three-time inductee to the Naismith Memorial Basketball Hall of Fame.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Matt McCarty wins first PGA event at Black Desert Championship
item.description: IVINS, Utah (AP) - IVINS, Utah (AP) — Matt McCarty started the year on the Korn Ferry Tour and now is headed to the Masters, winning his first PGA Tour title Sunday at the Black Desert Championship with a 4-under 67 and one swing that all but sealed it.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Dodgers tie postseason mark of 33 straight scoreless innings, top Mets 9-0 in NLCS opener
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — After spending the first seven years of his big league career back East, Jack Flaherty came home. He joined a winning team in the Los Angeles Dodgers and helped make a bit of playoff history.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Breanna Stewart helps New York even WNBA Finals series as Liberty beat Lynx 80-66 in Game 2
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Breanna Stewart wasn't going to let history repeat itself. With the Minnesota Lynx making another fourth quarter run, the two-time league MVP refused to let the New York Liberty lose again.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jackson outduels Daniels and Henry runs for two TDs as Ravens beat Commanders 30-23
item.description: Lamar Jackson threw nine passes to Zay Flowers in the first half and never went to him again. Mark Andrews rebounded from a ball bouncing off his hands for an interception to catch his first touchdown pass of the season. And Derrick Henry was Derrick Henry.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mayfield passes for 4 TDs as the Bucs treat storm-weary fans to a 51-27 win over the Saints
item.description: Baker Mayfield overcame three turnovers with 325 yards and four touchdowns passing, and the Tampa Bay Buccaneers defeated the New Orleans Saints 51-27 in what they hoped would be a morale boost to their many fans who endured Hurricane Milton.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Mets add McNeil to NLCS roster while Dodgers drop Vesia and Rojas, add Kiermaier and Honeywell
item.description: Jeff McNeil was added to the New York Mets' roster for the NL Championship Series against the Los Angeles Dodgers after recovering from a broken right wrist. Right-handed reliever Adam Ottavino was dropped from the Mets' roster. Tommy Edman will start at shortstop throughout the NLCS, Roberts said.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: AP Top 25: Oregon, Penn State move behind No. 1 Texas. Army, Navy both ranked for 1st time since '60
item.description: Oregon and Penn State each moved up a spot in The Associated Press college football poll on Sunday following thrilling wins in high-profile games, and Top 25 newcomers Navy and Army are in the rankings together for the first time since 1960.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bears dominate Jaguars in London, 35-16, to extend winning streak to 3 games going into bye week
item.description: The Bears capped off their London trip in style Sunday, routing the Jacksonville Jaguars, 35-16, at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium to extend their winning streak to three games and improve to 4-2 on the season.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: North Carolina football player dies from rare lung cancer at 23
item.description: UNC had honored Tylee Craft, 23, during Saturday's game. Coach Mack Brown, however, said he hadn't learned of Craft's death until after the game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Blackhawks beat Oilers, 5-2, for first win of 2024-25 season
item.description: EDMONTON, Alberta (AP) — The Blackhawks will go into the final game of their season-opening road trip with win on their ledger.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Thomas hits grand slam off Skubal, Guardians down Tigers 7-3 to reach AL Championship Series
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — For the third time in less than a month, the Cleveland Guardians made a semi-circle in the middle of their clubhouse and emptied champagne and beer bottles on each other as “Rocky Top” blasted through the speakers. The choice of music is unique. So is this team.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Breanna Stewart and the Liberty look to bounce back and even WNBA Finals series against the Lynx
item.description: The two-time MVP and her teammates will need to be at their best on Sunday when they face the Lynx in Game 2 of the best-of-five series.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 49ers rookie receiver Ricky Pearsall will return to practice for the 1st time since he was shot
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — San Francisco 49ers rookie receiver Ricky Pearsall is set to return to practice next week for the first time since he was shot in the chest in a robbery attempt nine days before the season opener.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: SoFi Stadium awarded 2025, 2027 Concacaf Nations League finals
item.description: Los Angeles is set to host not one, but two more significant soccer matchups, including one next year. SoFi Stadium will be the site of the next two Concacaf Nations League Finals in 2025 and 2027, officials announced Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: How much are Padres tickets?
item.description: Are you hoping to cheer on the Padres from the stands of Petco Park for Game 4 of the National League Division Series?
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5
